message:
refactor(hook): Integrate DenialBox TUI for denial rendering

Replace inline box rendering in print_colorful_warning with DenialBox
from the output module for consistent, TTY-aware denial messages.

Changes:
- Use DenialBox.render() for rich output, render_plain() for plain
- Add print_learning_commands() helper for post-box content
- Remove unused helpers: wrap_text, wrap_text_preserve_indent,
  print_contextual_suggestion_boxed, strip_ansi_codes
- Remove test_strip_ansi_codes (function moved to denial.rs)

Closes: git_safety_guard-advk.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
